name: @ibbybuilds/discli
description: discli — Discord server management CLI. Control your servers from the terminal. Built for humans and AI agents.

scripts.release:patch: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm version minor && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm version major && git push && git push --tags

author: ibbybuilds
